seoTitle: Murray Downs vs Murray Gorge — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Murray Downs and Murray Gorge. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Murray Downs vs Murray Gorge: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Murray Downs and Murray Gorge.
heading: Murray Downs vs Murray Gorge — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Murray Downs, New South Wales and Murray Gorge, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Murray Downs has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Murray Gorge (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Murray Downs or Murray Gorge safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Murray Downs has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Murray Gorge scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Murray Downs scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Murray Gorge scores 46/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Murray Downs or Murray Gorge?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Murray Downs has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
